AssociateTeamMember.description: Grants permission to add a user to the team for an AWS CodeStar project

CreateProject.description: Grants permission to create a project with minimal structure, customer policies, and no resources

CreateUserProfile.description: Grants permission to create a profile for a user that includes user preferences, display name, and email

DeleteExtendedAccess.description: Grants permission to extended delete APIs

DeleteProject.description: Grants permission to delete a project, including project resources. Does not delete users associated with the project, but does delete the IAM roles that allowed access to the project

DeleteUserProfile.description: Grants permission to delete a user profile in AWS CodeStar, including all personal preference data associated with that profile, such as display name and email address. It does not delete the history of that user, for example the history of commits made by that user

DescribeProject.description: Grants permission to describe a project and its resources

DescribeUserProfile.description: Grants permission to describe a user in AWS CodeStar and the user attributes across all projects

DisassociateTeamMember.description: Grants permission to remove a user from a project. Removing a user from a project also removes the IAM policies from that user that allowed access to the project and its resources

GetExtendedAccess.description: Grants permission to extended read APIs

ListProjects.description: Grants permission to list all projects in CodeStar associated with your AWS account

ListResources.description: Grants permission to list all resources associated with a project in CodeStar

ListTagsForProject.description: Grants permission to list the tags associated with a project in CodeStar

ListTeamMembers.description: Grants permission to list all team members associated with a project

ListUserProfiles.description: Grants permission to list user profiles in AWS CodeStar

PutExtendedAccess.description: Grants permission to extended write APIs

TagProject.description: Grants permission to add tags to a project in CodeStar

UntagProject.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a project in CodeStar

UpdateProject.description: Grants permission to update a project in CodeStar

UpdateTeamMember.description: Grants permission to update team member attributes within a CodeStar project

UpdateUserProfile.description: Grants permission to update a profile for a user that includes user preferences, display name, and email

VerifyServiceRole.description: Grants permission to verify whether the AWS CodeStar service role exists in the customer's account

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by requests based on the allowed set of values for each of the tags

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by actions based on tag-value associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by requests based on the presence of mandatory tags in the request

iam:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by actions based on tag-value associated with the resource
